author: y4rr
content: Blocker: shuffled_droplast FAIL is structural. With Option B (SET-equality), rust+torch agree the set of items is identical EXCEPT when drop_last interacts with shuffle: rust's PRNG selects a different permutation than torch's, so when each side drops the last 2 items (10 items, batch=4, drop=>kept=8) they're dropping DIFFERENT items. Cannot pass with Option B. The fix is documented in dispatch: pin TWO trajectories (Option C extension). For shuffled_droplast specifically the harness should compare ferrotorch's iteration against a ferrotorch-side ground truth (or alternatively: take SET-equality only over BOTH sides' kept items unioned — but that gives a meaningless test).
